homepageSectionOrder.notes: Two-column desktop: left=headline+trust line+primary CTA; right=LeadCaptureForm floating card (40% width). Mobile: headline, trust line, primary CTA button, then form below.
Immediately below Hero. Visible above fold on large screens. Five trust badges in a horizontal strip.
Four service cards. Each card links to its service subpage. Secondary CTA 'See All Services' → /services at bottom.
Free Color Consultation + Estimate offer. Accent background. Primary CTA button + phone number.
Star-rated customer quotes. No CTA — pure trust content.
City grid with 'We serve Dixon + 20 miles' message. Link to /service-areas.
6-question accordion. No CTA inline; bottom of section has secondary phone link.
Full-width band below FAQ. Headline + repeat LeadCaptureForm. This is the second form instance on the homepage.

formPlacements.desktopLayout: right-column sticky card — 40% width, rounded shadow card, position: sticky top-24
formPlacements.mobileLayout: below hero CTA button, full-width, no sticky behavior
formPlacements.headline: Get My Free Estimate + Color Consult
formPlacements.subline: No pressure. We respond within 24 hours.

formPlacements.headline: Ready to Get Started?
formPlacements.subline: Free estimate. Free color consultation. No obligation.

formPlacements.mobileLayout: full-width stack — phone number block first, then form
formPlacements.headline: Send My Estimate Request

/.text: Get My Free Estimate + Color Consult
/.style: Large filled button — accent color (bg-accent text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-lg text-lg font-semibold shadow-md hover:bg-accent-dark transition)

ctaButton.style: bg-accent text-white px-5 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-accent-dark transition

desktopScrolledState.triggerMechanism: IntersectionObserver on a 1px sentinel div at top of page — when sentinel leaves viewport, header gets class 'header--scrolled'

mobileState.notes: MobileStickyCTABar handles conversion on mobile; header stays minimal

leftHalf.style: bg-accent text-white flex items-center justify-center gap-2 font-semibold w-1/2 h-full

rightHalf.style: bg-neutral-800 text-white flex items-center justify-center font-semibold w-1/2 h-full

mobileStickyCTABar.visibilityRule: display on mobile only (hidden md:hidden or CSS media query max-width: 767px)

fields.name: message
fields.label: Tell Us About Your Project (optional)
fields.placeholder: Describe your space, timeline, or any questions...

submitButton.style: w-full bg-accent text-white py-4 rounded-lg font-semibold text-lg hover:bg-accent-dark transition

netlifyFormConfig.trustMicrocopy: We respond within 24 hours. No spam, ever.

successState.thankYouText: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

netlifyFormConfig.htmlTemplate:
We respond within 24 hours. No spam, ever.

Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

trustSignalPlacements.location: TrustSignalsBar — immediately below Hero on all pages that use the shared layout
signals: Licensed & Insured — Full coverage on every job
Locally Owned — Based right here in Dixon, CA
Free Color Consultation — We help you choose before you commit
Clean, Punctual, Reliable — We respect your home and your schedule
Serving Dixon + 20 Miles — Including Vacaville, Woodland, Fairfield & Davis
trustSignalPlacements.style: Horizontal strip, icon + short label per signal, light background, border-bottom, overflow-x-auto on mobile

trustSignalPlacements.location: LeadCaptureForm — below submit button (all form instances)
signals: We respond within 24 hours. No spam, ever.
trustSignalPlacements.style: Small text, muted color, centered below submit button — p class="form-trust text-sm text-neutral-500 text-center mt-2"

trustSignalPlacements.location: Hero section — below headline, above primary CTA
signals: Licensed & Insured | Free Color Consultation | Serving Dixon + 20 Miles
trustSignalPlacements.style: Inline trust line — text-sm text-neutral-600, pipe-separated

trustSignalPlacements.location: Service subpages — after hero body text, before service details
trustSignalPlacements.style: Mini inline bullet list or 4-icon trust bar — text-sm, checkmark or shield icons, horizontal flex row

trustSignalPlacements.location: Contact page — right column beside form
trustSignalPlacements.style: Vertical list with checkmark icons — font-medium text-neutral-700
Footer column 3 — standard footer text with small badge icon
